ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "credit" TEXT /* Credit for the film (e.g., producer, director) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the director in the film */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the film, including awards or nominations */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of film (e.g., documentary, feature film, short film) */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Length of the film in minutes */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the film */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue of the film */,
  "awards" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the film */,
  "nominations" INTEGER /* Number of nominations received by the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES film_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the film type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the film type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, contributor, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film that received the nomination */,
  "nomination_name" TEXT /* Name of the nomination */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the nomination was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the nomination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the crew member was involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_crew_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
